title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Caesar P. Perez to Enter Into and Sign a Memorandum of Agreement MOA, in Behalf of the Municipality of Los Baños, with the Boys Scouts of the Philippines to Use Certain Facilities of Their Edifices As Isolation or Quarantine Isolation Unit or Areas for Covid -19 Cases. (AUTHOR(S): Councilor(s) Josephine S. Evangelista, Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B
